mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT table_name FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND table_name IS NOT NULL AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY table_name ASC

SELECT DISTINCT ON (table_name) table_name, collected_at, -- Bloat 계산 CASE WHEN relsize_total_bytes > 0 AND (n_live_tup + n_dead_tup) > 0 THEN (n_dead_tup::NUMERIC / (n_live_tup + n_dead_tup + 1)) ELSE 0 END AS bloat_ratio, -- Bloat Bytes (dead tuple이 차지하는 예상 공간) (n_dead_tup * 100) AS bloat_bytes, -- 튜플당 평균 100바이트로 가정 -- Dead Tuples n_dead_tup AS dead_tuple_total, -- Table Size relsize_total_bytes AS table_size, -- Vacuum 정보 session_started_at AS last_vacuum FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND table_name = #{tableName} AND collected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY table_name, collected_at DESC

WITH daily_bloat AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', collected_at) AS day, AVG( CASE WHEN relsize_total_bytes > 0 AND (n_live_tup + n_dead_tup) > 0 THEN (n_dead_tup::NUMERIC / (n_live_tup + n_dead_tup + 1)) ELSE 0 END ) AS bloat_ratio FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND table_name = #{tableName} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND n_dead_tup IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', collected_at) ) SELECT day AS collected_at, bloat_ratio FROM daily_bloat WHERE bloat_ratio IS NOT NULL ORDER BY day ASC

WITH daily_dead_tuples AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', collected_at) AS day, AVG(n_dead_tup) AS dead_tuple_total FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND table_name = #{tableName} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND n_dead_tup IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('day', collected_at) ) SELECT day AS collected_at, ROUND(dead_tuple_total) AS dead_tuple_total FROM daily_dead_tuples WHERE dead_tuple_total IS NOT NULL ORDER BY day ASC
SELECT CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) AS index_name, CAST(NULL AS NUMERIC) AS bloat_ratio, CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP) AS collected_at WHERE 1=0
